budgets_note: Budgets RATIFIED UNCHANGED at v3-M5 (2026-07-10): one full-length e4_arm_p calibration sequence (seed 37, 6 tasks, glm-5.2 thinking-on, z.ai paas/v4 route direct-zhipu-api-key) observed max 7/27 turns, 178400/490000 tokens, 2/12 verifications, $0.8175/$5 — no wall hit, the freeze rule's fits-with-headroom branch applies. Values remain the v2 v0.3 set (27 turns / 12 verifications / 490000 tokens / $5 cap), read from the frozen v2 file; version 0.1 -> 0.2 marks this ratification event. Model-id pin: these budgets transfer to a v3-M6 evidence run only on the exact model id glm-5.2, thinking-ON, on this route; any other model or thinking configuration repeats the ratification. Provenance: docs/protocols/e4-v3-m5-calibration-manifest-20260710-001.json + docs/protocols/e4-v3-m5-reasoning-observability-20260710-001.json; notes docs/e4/E4V3-M5-BUDGET-CALIBRATION-NOTES.md. The ASK_PM and product-gate protocol texts are sealed via the code_twins over turn-protocol.ts and product-gate.ts. v2 v0.3 -> v0.4 / v3 v0.2 -> v0.3 (2026-07-11, Phase-0 learning boundary): budgets UNCHANGED; the boundary moved for the harness-feedback fixes found by the M6 adversarial review (openspec validate stderr passthrough, archive-abort hint passthrough, README capability-retirement section) — budgets remain ratified on glm-5.2 thinking-on per the v3-M5 event; the v3-M6 evidence manifests stamp the historical v2 2f78f534... / v3 aec35e3d... hashes (re-run that verdict against the archived files via git show 5ed1d87:<path>). v2 v0.4 -> v0.5 / v3 v0.3 -> v0.4 (2026-07-12, §5.7 Amendment 3 substrate naturalization): budgets UNCHANGED; the boundary moved because the fixture-migration verification showed 41/63 M6 + 9/13 learning false-confidence events were fully explained by undisclosed convention traps (naive pluralization, seed-fixture regeneration) — substrate_version is now procedural-rest-v2.1 (English pluralizer, seed-data carry-forward, ref-key cascade, PM-brief fixture_migration disclosure); the v2 code-twin set also gains the feedback-behavior modules (openspec/runner/gate/workspace/fake-provider) per the 2026-07-12 external-audit design inputs. Budgets remain ratified on glm-5.2 thinking-on per the v3-M5 event, but the substrate change SHOULD be re-checked by the pre-seal full-budget rename-free calibration rung before any evidence run. v3 v0.4 -> v0.5 (2026-07-12, v3-M7 gate commit, operator 'Proceed to all 3'): budgets UNCHANGED and remain ratified by the seed-144 pre-seal calibration rung (freeze-unchanged: max 12/27 turns, 183.8k/490k tokens, $0.63/$5 — docs/e4/E4V3-M7-PRECAL-NOTES.md); the v0.4->v0.5 delta is disclosure/instrument-only (one PM-brief line for add_entity 'starts with no records' + the sealed m7_evidence block {close_rate_guard_max_gap 0.15, scheduled_tasks_per_sequence 6}), with no budget-relevant surface — the carry of the ratification across this delta is a recorded judgment call. TOMBSTONE DISCLOSURE (external-audit design input 5, recorded at this seal): the workspace README's capability-retirement section (present in BOTH arms since the Phase-0 boundary ae4169d) teaches gold's canonical retirement shape (ADDED tombstone + REMOVED all prior requirements) as a shared-environment affordance; it does not leak gold's paths or data.
